task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the ordered validation slices and full suite to completion, then finished the required grep and manual reproduction checks. Slice 1 (`pytest tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_tx_signature_history.py tests/test_safe_delete_messages.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py tests/test_terminal_cleanup_wiring.py -x`) initially exposed a plain-`pytest` import-path regression; fixing repo-root insertion in `tests/conftest.py` and correcting the producer_flows import in `tests/test_payment_authorization.py` made the slice pass.
